description_long: This is a modern single-story bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a spacious open layout and large windows throughout. The exterior is finished in light-colored brick and concrete, complemented by a fenced yard with palm trees and a swimming pool. The front includes a driveway with two parked cars and a garage, while the backyard offers a shaded patio area and poolside lounge. The landscaping is minimalistic, with a mix of grass, paved walkways, and decorative shrubs. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, outdoor living, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with large windows, a fenced yard, pool, and garage, featuring clean lines and minimalistic landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and a clear view of the pool and patio area in the backyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, patio, and backyard landscaping, with the garage and driveway partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garage, driveway, and main entrance, with decorative shrubs and a clear view of the front facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and backyard, with both cars and the garage visible from the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
